# ClinicFlow - Medical Center

ClinicFlow is a secure, role-based, multi-user healthcare workflow platform. It manages client scheduling, doctor consultations, receptionist queues, electronic medical records, lab test orders, result uploads, and manager analytics.

## Main Sitemap
- Home: https://clinicflow.vercel.app/
- About: https://clinicflow.vercel.app/about
- Login: https://clinicflow.vercel.app/login
- Register: https://clinicflow.vercel.app/register

## Role Architecture
- **Clients**: Book consultations, request lab tests, view medical histories, invoices, and results.
- **Doctors**: Manage schedules, record consultation notes, recommend lab tests, and write digital prescriptions.
- **Receptionists**: Handle client registrations, check-in queues, and bill invoices.
- **Lab Managers**: Manage lab tests catalogs, check-in test slots, and upload results.
- **Managers**: Manage staff lists, test service catalogs, asset inventory, finance audits, and activity logs.

## Technology Stack
- Next.js 16 (App Router)
- Supabase (PostgreSQL with Row-Level Security)
- TailwindCSS (Styling)
- Cloudinary (Scanned document and PDF hosting)
